relations: The DeLorean is used as a time machine in "Back to the Future" to facilitate time travel
The TARDIS is a time machine in "Doctor Who" used for traveling through time and space
Fringe includes time travel as part of its exploration of parallel universes and alternate timelines
The Flash showcases time travel in its narrative of navigating multiple timelines
Looper is a movie that incorporates time travel to prevent a future catastrophe
The Butterfly Effect deals with the unintended consequences of time travel to change the past
"The Time Machine" is a novel written by H.G. Wells that explores time travel
The DeLorean is featured in "Back to the Future" as a time machine
The TARDIS is featured in "Doctor Who" as a time machine for space and time travel
The Time-Turner, a magical time travel device, is introduced in the "Harry Potter" series by J.K. Rowling
Both shows explore the concept of parallel universes or alternate timelines
Fringe explores the concept of parallel universes as a part of its narrative
The Flash involves characters navigating alternate timelines to prevent catastrophic events
Both movies deal with the theme of changing the past to alter the future
